hooks.command: file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // .filePath // empty'); if [[ "$file" == *.lock ]] || [[ "$file" == *.env ]] || [[ "$file" == *.env.* ]]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit lock files or .env files directly' >&2; exit 1; fi

file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // .filePath // empty'); if [[ "$file" == *.py ]]; then cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/backend" && uv run ruff format "$file" 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff check --fix "$file" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
